title: Readiness Bridge
symptom: flaky readiness detection via DOM heuristics
fix: explicit window.e2eApi readiness signal (booting/login/onboarding/main); waitForMainAppReady prefers bridge, falls back to DOM
insight: explicit readiness signal beats DOM heuristics but did not eliminate flakiness

title: Extended StartupRecoveryDialog timeout
symptom: recovery dialog appears prematurely on slow CI startup
fix: 30s->120s in E2E mode
insight: later superseded by E2E-mode gating that hides the dialog entirely

title: API key seeding
symptom: silent agent-turn failures when skipping onboarding
fix: pre-seed Claude API key in writeMinimalSettings (TEST_CLAUDE_API_KEY)
insight: skip-onboarding paths still need a non-null API key

title: safeCloseApp() + platform-aware timeouts
symptom: afterAll teardown timeouts, orphaned processes
fix: 15s graceful then app.exit(0) force-quit; longer Windows timeouts
insight: force-quit also fails on CI runners; shutdown remains unsolved (Known Hard Problem #1)

title: Playwright waitForFunction arg fix
symptom: Windows tests timed out at 30s despite setting 60s
fix: signature is (fn,arg,options) not (fn,options); pass undefined as 2nd arg
insight: valid bug fix but main flakiness drivers were elsewhere

title: Remaining issues identified (CI #21061941822)
symptom: app-launch stalls, click timeouts on overlays, ~20 orphan-process teardown failures
fix: applied safeCloseApp everywhere; dismiss recovery dialog before clicks
insight: orphaned processes cascade into resource contention + slower launches

title: E2E Test Improvement Plan (unskip + coverage)
symptom: systematic unskipping
fix: unskip existing + new coverage informed by this doc
insight: 6 unskipped tests failed in CI but passed locally -> led to #8

title: CI-only failures after unskipping
symptom: beforeAll hooks exceed 120s; keyboard shortcuts not registering headless
fix: test.describe.configure({timeout}) for hooks; focus before keyboard.press; waitForSuperMcpReady
insight: test.setTimeout() does NOT cover beforeAll/afterAll hooks; use describe.configure({timeout})

title: Root cause: test fast path
symptom: 60s wasted in trySetDeterministicWindowBounds on headless CI; pre-turn overhead; detached orphans
fix: fast path skips isVisible() in test mode; added [E2E][timing] logs
insight: E2E ran full production startup with no test-mode fast path

title: Fast path env var fix
symptom: fast path not active; message-queue shortcut/selector wrong
fix: fastPath=true (was checking REBEL_E2E_TEST_MODE in wrong process); Alt+Enter; queued-message-send-now selector
insight: env vars set on Electron launch are NOT available in the Playwright test process

title: Test consolidation into sequenced suites
symptom: too many app launches/shutdown boundaries
fix: sequence-a/b/c.spec.ts via test.describe.serial(); resetAppState() helper
insight: replaced by 9 independent domain-based files Jan 27; tests needing fresh state run FIRST not ALONE

title: Selector stability fixes
symptom: onboarding Continue + mention-tab click timeouts
fix: data-testid on onboarding-get-started + mention-filter-* buttons
insight: text/aria-state selectors are fragile for buttons whose label/state changes

title: Submit button strict mode violation
symptom: button[type=submit] resolved to 2 elements (~90% of failures)
fix: data-testid=composer-send-button; updated selectors
insight: generic attribute selectors break when the app grows a second matching element

title: OfflineBanner click blocking + misc
symptom: banner with z-index 9999 intercepts clicks when navigator.onLine false in CI
fix: pointer-events:none on informational banner; h2->h3; stop-turn-button testid
insight: informational overlays must set pointer-events:none or they silently block clicks

title: Stop button disabled state + MentionPopover z-index
symptom: click stop-turn-button while disabled={isStopping}; nav tabs intercept mention filter
fix: try/catch both success paths; MentionPopover z-index 10->50; voice beforeAll 120->180s
insight: visible-but-disabled buttons + popover/nav stacking-context conflicts

title: Windows app-launch timeout + macOS selector ambiguity
symptom: firstWindow Timeout 30000ms across all Windows specs; article.agent-turn-message matched 2
fix: skip all specs on win32 (macOS covers); add [data-role=assistant] filter
insight: disambiguate user vs assistant messages with data-role; Windows launch needs dedicated investigation

title: Draft persistence timing race
symptom: draft empty: fill() then immediate New Chat; React state not committed before flush
fix: await send-button toBeEnabled() after fill() before switching sessions
insight: wait for a state-driven UI signal (button enabled), not arbitrary timeouts, for debounced state

title: Parallel worker interference + message-queue timing
symptom: orphaned processes from one worker wedge another's Playwright IPC; Send Now user msg not found
fix: workers:1 in CI; stop-button appear-then-disappear; data-role=user selector
insight: detached Super-MCP orphans wedge cross-worker IPC; verify async completion via appear-then-disappear

title: Tool approval UI architecture change
symptom: tool-approval-bar testid no longer rendered
fix: ToolApprovalBar->PendingReviewBar; added pending-review-bar/tool-allow-button/tool-deny-button testids
insight: UI component consolidation requires test selector updates; this is a real regression signal, not flakiness

title: Symlink destruction in artifact upload
symptom: all macOS E2E fail beforeAll 120s; Electron framework symlinks broken
fix: tar .app before upload-artifact@v4, untar after download (with symlink-count check)
insight: actions/upload-artifact@v4 destroys symlinks; tar any macOS .app/framework before upload

title: StickyApprovalStack overlay blocks interactions
symptom: _stackContent_ div intercepts pointer events on dropdowns
fix: pointer-events fix in StickyApprovalStack CSS + test-side dismissal; reason-field assertion
insight: components that auto-open overlays in response to injected IPC are a recurring E2E footgun

title: enableGuestMode timeout — #app-loading removal + AuthGate blind spot
symptom: waitForFunction 30s timeout; AuthGate loading div had no detectable attribute
fix: auth-gate-loading testid; stop removing #app-loading from DOM; null-safe detection; local workers 4->2
insight: every full-screen startup loading state needs a data-testid or detection gaps cause 30s timeouts

title: Stop button timeout + background memory-turn interference
symptom: stop button visible 30s+; abort ignored during ~2000-line executeAgentTurn setup; memory turns invisible
fix: 3 abort checkpoints in setup; memoryUpdateEnabled:false in test settings; count-check before getAttribute
insight: fire-and-forget executeAgentTurn (memory updates) is invisible to resetAppState — gate via settings toggle

title: Auth banner blocks send button in mocked tests
symptom: auth-missing banner disables send when TEST_CLAUDE_API_KEY unset
fix: launchWithMocking auto-seeds dummy sk-ant key; mock intercepts before real call
insight: mocked tests that drive the composer need a non-null key to pass the auth gate

title: Handler overwrite race in launchWithMocking
symptom: mock agent:turn handler overwritten by real handler during async whenReady init
fix: await firstWindow() before enableLlmMocking (window creation is last init step); pre-dismiss EventSeriesBanner
insight: firstWindow() is a reliable sync point past all IPC handler registration

title: Preload-level guest mode (6th enableGuestMode iteration)
symptom: CDP post-render guestMode injection races useAuth() init
fix: REBEL_TEST_MODE=1 -> preload sets sessionStorage.guestMode on DOMContentLoaded before React mounts; enableGuestMode 120->20 LOC
insight: set guest mode via preload before React mounts, not CDP post-render; guard ensureRebelTestMode settings-seeding for skipOnboarding:false

title: Cleanup-marker argv flag + mandatory userDataPath
symptom: voice beforeAll 120s timeout in conversation->voice cascade (orphan processes)
fix: argv cleanup-marker flag + mandatory userDataPath for reliable orphan cleanup
insight: manifestation of Known Hard Problem #1 (shutdown) in a cross-spec cascade

title: CI-aware startup-probe timeout + pipeline artifact loss
symptom: voice-session-routing startup-probe-timeout at 0ms on first run and retry
fix: CI-aware startup-probe timeout; fix pipeline artifact loss
insight: startup probe was too tight for CI; pairs with #27 argv-marker fix

title: Cloud continuity vitest E2E stale bundle
symptom: tests ran obsolete cloud-service/dist/server.mjs, not current TS
fix: npm test runs node cloud-service/build.mjs first to rebuild bundle
insight: vitest E2E against a prebuilt bundle silently tests stale code unless rebuilt first

title: Demo-mode false-positive under test isolation + approval-flows drawer drift
symptom: whole approval-flows suite failing identically after a DOM change
fix: updated stale expandFirstDrawerGroup() after drawer header <button aria-expanded> -> <div>
insight: a coherent cluster failing identically right after an area change = stale test (see PUSH_TO_BETA.md §6)

title: Session-management in-file session accumulation
symptom: shared app across describes; resetAppState didn't clear sessions; Draft Persistence matched stale sidebar entries
fix: opt-in e2eApi.clearAllSessions() helper; asserts 0 sessions before test
insight: shared-app suites must clear created state between describes, not just reset UI

title: Beta-push E2E triage — cloud-service timeout classified, not fixed
symptom: inbound-author-policy + messaging 'Timed out waiting for local cloud service' recurring on beta runs
fix: none — classified as CI-load infra flake (Known Hard Problem #6); deferred per gating triage
insight: E2E is not publish-gated; don't spend a push's budget on non-gating infra flakes. Real fix later: unify the 3 duplicated cloud-service ready-waits then tune timeout

title: Approval drawer stale test ID after decision-first preview rebuild
symptom: validate:e2e-testids blocked a push: STALE test ID 'drawer-card-review' at tests/e2e/approval-flows.spec.ts:459 after the approval drawer removed the Review button from the card face
fix: Updated the test name, comment, and selector to the decision-first preview affordance 'drawer-card-preview-badge', keeping the same coverage (click the approval-card affordance, assert the memory preview dialog opens with expected content)
insight: When a UI affordance is renamed/removed, validate:e2e-testids flags stale test IDs; point the selector at the new data-testid (drawer-card-preview-badge) rather than the removed one (drawer-card-review). Migrated inline from doc entry #33 during a sync merge.

title: Seeded post-onboarding Home activation-card guard (onboarding.spec.ts)
symptom: No E2E asserted the coach path after onboarding (gap behind the 260611 coach-chat-missing incident)
fix: New ungated seeded-state describe: default skipOnboarding seed IS wizard-complete/coach-incomplete; asserts Home activation CTA (new data-testid=onboarding-activation-cta), post-relaunch persistence, negative control; mutation-verified RED on a simulated gating regression
insight: Playwright treats a static annotation {type:'skip'} in test.describe(title, details, fn) as a REAL cross-platform skip (workerMain processAnnotation) — onboarding.spec.ts:86's 'Windows CI preflight blocker' annotation silently skips the ENTIRE with-keys describe on macOS too; also the no-keys welcome test is stale (welcome step now shows EULA + 'Set up this computer', no 'Let's check' button)
